category_sources: Official wxPython site and docs describe wxPython Phoenix API documentation and overview documents.
source_facts.description says wxPython provides Python bindings for wxWidgets.
display_name_sources: Official docs domain title is wxPython API Documentation.
Official wxPython website uses wxPython capitalization.
docs_sources: Official docs.wxpython.org is the dedicated API documentation domain.
Official wxPython documentation page links API reference, wiki, books, and repository.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository identifies Phoenix as wxPython's project.
Official wxPython homepage Quick Links points to the GitHub Repository at wxWidgets/Phoenix.
tags_sources: Official wxPython documentation page links the API reference and wiki.
source_facts.description identifies Python bindings for wxWidgets.
source_facts.executables includes wxdemo, wxdocs, pycrust, and pyshell.
